wikitext:
[]: [MUSIC] Death & Rebirth credits music             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Thu Mar 05, 2009 11:21 pm In the music at the end of the end-credits, there's this little tango-ish sounding bit (post Canon in D and the slow, string-orchestra arrangement of "A Cruel Angel's Thesis"). Does anyone know what the heck the title of it is? I'm trying to find it among my sources, but it would make it easier to pin down if I knew the title...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 06, 2009 5:00 pm "B-3 [BACKGROUND MUSIC III]" on TV soundtrack 3, S2 Works, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Mar 06, 2009 5:57 pm Reichu wrote: "B-3 [BACKGROUND MUSIC III]" on TV soundtrack 3, S2 Works, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Mar 06, 2009 6:29 pm Is this what you are looking for? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OXq2kdYJ9YI

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 06, 2009 6:33 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Is this what you are looking for?

Article: MUSIC Death and Rebirth credits music
[]: [MUSIC] Death & Rebirth credits music             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Thu Mar 05, 2009 11:21 pm In the music at the end of the end-credits, there's this little tango-ish sounding bit (post Canon in D and the slow, string-orchestra arrangement of "A Cruel Angel's Thesis"). Does anyone know what the heck the title of it is? I'm trying to find it among my sources, but it would make it easier to pin down if I knew the title...
